name: Bittersweet Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the chocolate into small pieces.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and sugar until thick and light.
3. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine milk and cream. Cook uncovered at 100% power for 2 minutes.
4. With the mixer running, slowly add the hot milk and cream mixture to the egg yolk mixture.
5. Blend until smooth and pour into the casserole dish.
6. Cook in the microwave at 100% power for 60 seconds.
7. Whisk the mixture, then cook for another 60 seconds.
8. Whisk again, then cook for a further 60 seconds, whisking once more. The mixture should be thick enough to coat the back of a spoon.
9. Remove from the microwave and stir in the chocolate until smooth.
10. Stir in the buttermilk.
11. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
12. Chill the mixture, loosely covered, for at least 3 hours.
13. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
